name: AWS
description: Amazon Web Services is the cloud computing platform from Amazon offering compute, storage, networking, and managed services.

years.notes: Original AWS mark: five isometric cubes arranged in a curved cluster, accompanying the 'Amazon Web Services' wordmark. Cube cluster only retained for the 24×24 icon; wordmark omitted for legibility.
Rebrand to 'AWS' acronym with the Amazon smile arrow underneath. Dark slate wordmark over the iconic orange smile.
Koto and Amazon XCM refresh (May 2025): redrawn smile with softer curves, Amazon Ember Modern typeface, deeper 'Smile Orange' (#FF6200) and near-black slate.
